title: Eva operating picture P0
user_task: As Eva, answer how the business/project operating picture looks using LCO/Codex state, optional structured GitHub items, and explicit PLAN_STATE pins while reporting missing P1 sources honestly.
expected_public_safe_evidence: clean operating-card summaries and next actions projected from cleaned Codex session cards
GitHub statusCheckRollup pending, failed, passed, and unknown check-state reason codes
current_lane and fresh_signal reason codes for fresh actionable GitHub PR/check items
low_confidence_downgraded reason codes for old missing-evidence Codex cards
customer_impact, runtime_impact, security_impact, or production_impact reason codes outranking current-lane PRs when present
manual pins from explicit PLAN_STATE markers only
unmarked PLAN_STATE stale prose ignored as current truth
low_confidence or unknown state for conflicting inputs
unknown or low_confidence state for unavailable authority
private_data_exclusions: support-control secrets or customer runtime data
proof_boundary: Dry-run P0 scenario contract for Eva Operating Picture. It may prove read-only structured digest behavior for LCO/Codex, current-lane source-balanced ranking, deterministically normalized GitHub issue/PR/check records including caller-provided statusCheckRollup check-state fidelity, and PLAN_STATE pins, but does not prove Notion, support-control, Company Brain, Stripe, customer readiness, full business truth, or 1.0 readiness.
next_action: Run `loo_github_operating_items` and `loo_business_pulse` through the local OpenClaw gateway with public-safe PLAN_STATE pins and GitHub fixtures.
